subject: writing
activity_templates: A Pre-K pre-writing line tracing worksheet. Five rows of dotted lines showing different stroke patterns (straight, wavy, zigzag, loopy, curved) for the child to trace. {{character}} starts at the first row holding a crayon.

A shape-path tracing worksheet. A cute cartoon character needs to reach a goal by tracing a dotted path (circles, spirals, diagonals). Four paths of increasing difficulty. {{character}} is at the start, a friend waits at the end.
A trace-the-curve worksheet focused on curved lines (rainbows, waves, loops). Five dotted curves of varying styles for the child to trace. {{character}} jumps over the curves.
A trace-the-shape-outlines worksheet. Five large dotted shape outlines (circle, square, triangle, heart, star) for the child to trace completely. {{character}} holds a giant pencil.
